summary: Reworked only M0-001 and closed verifier finding F-01. BCR acquisition is now one admitted-manifest-driven fixed-output transaction that preflights the complete 39-coordinate Nix/Bzlmod population, keeps all 26 fetched BCR inputs quarantined under one 4-GiB-per-blob/16-GiB-total/1,200-second budget, verifies raw digests, and promotes one read-only store output only after the full profile succeeds. c-09 now exercises unadmitted, mutable, hash-mismatch, exact, and first-over coordinate/blob/aggregate/time cases through the same promotion state machine and retains non-promotion evidence. Full Factory run run-20260722T134530Z passed c-01 through c-11; M0-001 is IMPLEMENTED for independent re-verification.
